articles.title: CAQ leadership: Drainville racks up support of 3 ministers as campaign enters last week
articles.description: Former CAQ minister and leadership candidate Bernard Drainville received the backing of three of his former cabinet colleagues Monday, a day before voting begins to elect François Legault’s successor. articles.title: Calgarian awaiting kidney transplant urges considering organ donation as Green Shirt Day nears
articles.description: Ahead of the eighth annual Green Shirt Day on Tuesday, Calgarians are invited to partake in a two-kilometre walk to raise awareness about organ and tissue donation.

articles.title: Last day to vote on the names of Toronto’s 2 new electric ferries
articles.description: Toronto’s two new electric ferries need names and time is running out to have your say, with Monday marking the last day that Toronto residents can vote from an online shortlist. Voting officially closes at 11:59 p.m. with the winning names to be announced later this spring. To cast your vote

articles.title: Montreal gas prices remain above $2 per litre due to conflict overseas
articles.description: Montreal drivers hoping to start the week with some relief at the pump were greeted with more of the same on Monday. articles.title: Deadlines to take down temporary car shelters approaching in Montreal
articles.description: It’s that time of the year again! After new traffic rules, it’s time for the temporary car shelters to come down soon. articles.title: Two school buses, dump and vacuum trucks, collide with passenger vehicles in NW Calgary
articles.description: A collision involving several vehicles in Calgary's northwest Monday morning has resulted in minor injuries and a road closure.

articles.title: Samsung is discontinuing its texting app, tells impacted users to switch to Google Messages
articles.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Samsung is saying goodbye its namesake texting app. According to an end of service announcement published on the tech giant’s U.S. support website, Samsung Messages will be discontinued in July. articles.title: Work continues on memorial for Humboldt Broncos 8 years after deadly bus crash

articles.title: Artemis II: Everything We Know as Its Crew Approaches the Far Side of the Moon
articles.description: Artemis II remains on course for its lunar flyby as the crew shares historic photos of Earth, tests key systems for future lunar missions, and attempts to fix the toilet.

articles.title: AP says it will offer buyouts as part of pivot away from newspaper journalism
articles.description: The Associated Press said Monday it is offering buyouts to an unspecified number of its U.S.-based journalists as part of an acceleration away from the focus on newspaper journalism that sustained the company since the mid-1800s. articles.title: AP says it will offer buyouts as part of pivot away from newspaper-focused history
articles.description: The Associated Press, one of the world’s oldest and most influential news organizations, said Monday it is offering buyouts to an unspecified number of its U.S.-based journalists as part of an acceleration away from the focus on newspapers and their print journalism that sustained the company
